patch.value: CONTEXT: packages are loaded via import(<file-url>) at runtime and are not inside the pm-cli tsc project. DECISION: each package ships hand-maintained .js next to .ts so it is directly loadable without an install-time build; correctness guarded by builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec activation smoke tests. CONSEQUENCES: zero build-time dependency to install a package; drift risk between .ts and .js (must edit both); .js not type-checked. EVIDENCE: packages/pm-*/extensions/*/index.{ts,js}; tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts; item pm-wwa7.
ADR: First-party packages ship hand-maintained .js alongside .ts (no per-package build)
First-party packages ship hand-maintained .js alongside .ts (no per-package build)
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
